name: bashlane
description: Keep Codex PowerShell sessions as a thin Bash lane into WSL.

interface.shortDescription: Route Codex command work from PowerShell into WSL.
interface.longDescription: Bashlane adds a global workflow for Codex chats launched through PowerShell: keep file edits in Codex, but run searches, tests, builds, git inspection, and other command-line work through the wsl-run helper so Linux project semantics stay intact across chats and workspaces.
defaultPrompt: Use Bashlane for command work in this PowerShell-backed workspace.
Refresh the global wsl-run helper from Bashlane.
Explain how Codex should use PowerShell as a thin transport layer for WSL commands.
